metadata.name: exam-center
metadata.description: IT 認證考試模擬系統 (SOC, NGFW, VCF)，含 shuffle bug fix、PDF answer verification、text format alignment
metadata.notes: DO App auto-deploy from git push to origin/main

context.last_topic: PDF line break cleaning (smart merge page wraps, keep intentional breaks)
key_points: All 3 exams (SOC 90 / NGFW 121 / VCF ?) running on DO
Shuffle bug: fixed by shuffling whole choice objects + recalculating answer from correct texts
SOC 90 answers verified vs PDF: 0 mismatch (Q19 missing from PDF OCR)
NGFW 121 answers verified vs PDF: 0 mismatch
pending_items: VCF answer verification vs PDF (not done yet)
decisions: Shuffle method: whole choice objects, not just text strings
Line break policy: merge page wraps (no sentence-end punct), keep intentional breaks
Answer key page uses unshuffled array (no change needed)

conversations.text: Initial setup: Terrence has a private 'exam' repo with VMware VCF quiz.html. Wants to build NGFW & SOC exam systems. Reference PDF: 'NGFW-Engineer Exam - Free Actual Q&As.pdf' (121 Qs) + SOC PDF (90 Qs). Created ngfw/quiz.html, soc/quiz.html, vcf/quiz.html with separate questions.js files.

SHUFFLE BUG DISCOVERY: shuffleChoices() only shuffled text strings while q.answer stayed at original letter → wrong scoring. Fix: identify correct texts from original q.answer, shuffle whole choice objects, reassign A/B/C/D letters, recompute q.answer from shuffled positions. Verified with 6000 simulations (1000 seeds × 6 question types) — zero failures. Applied to all 3 quiz.html files.
SOC 90 answer verification vs PDF: 88/89 matched, 1 mismatch → Q19 was PDF OCR missing 'Correct Answer:' line. REAL RESULT: 0 mismatch.
NGFW 121 answer verification vs PDF: 121/121 matched, 0 mismatch.
NGFW shuffleChoices dead code accidentally deleted from questions.js → restored via git checkout.
VCF reference.html deleted + button removed from index.html.
SOC text format alignment: 9 questions updated to match PDF (punctuation, commas, OCR typos).
NGFW text format alignment: 50 questions updated, then all 121 updated with PDF line breaks.

Final clean: smart line break logic applied to NGFW 121 + SOC 90. Merges page-wrap lines (no sentence-end punctuation), keeps intentional breaks (period/colon-end + short lines). Q1 still has some merged lines due to OCR missing periods. Q15/Q90 OCR artifacts removed.
